replacementCandidates.description: 1.5 A high-current low-dropout voltage regulator, fixed 12 V, TO-263 package.
fitNotes: Current live pairing is not a normal replacement path. MIC29150-12WU is a 12 V, 1.5 A TO-263 regulator, while NCP1117ST25T3G is a 2.5 V, 1.0 A SOT-223 1117-family regulator. This can only be kept as a redesign-level similar reference, not as a functional alternative.
replacementCandidates.productOverview: MIC29150-12WU is Microchip Technology's 1.5 A high-current low-dropout regulator in TO-263-3. It provides a fixed 12 V output, up to 1.5 A load current, typical 350 mV dropout at 1.5 A, and ±1% output tolerance. This part belongs in redesign-level regulator comparisons, not in same-output 1117 drop-in replacement lists.
replacementCandidates.reason: Current live pairing is not a normal replacement path. MIC29150-12WU is a 12 V, 1.5 A TO-263 regulator, while NCP1117ST25T3G is a 2.5 V, 1.0 A SOT-223 1117-family regulator. This can only be kept as a redesign-level similar reference, not as a functional alternative.

Product Attribute.Lifecycle Status: NRND / family in phased-out state; confirm current PCN before new design use

replacementCandidates.description: 1.0 A low-dropout fixed 2.5 V linear regulator, SOT-223, exact Diodes orderable part.
fitNotes: Functional enhanced alternative to the obsolete onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G. AZ1117H-2.5TRE1 is the exact Diodes SOT-223 orderable code for the 2.5 V AZ1117 family member, with ±1% tolerance and -40 C to +125 C operating range. It keeps the standard 1117 pinout and belongs in direct replacement reviews where tighter tolerance and industrial-temperature coverage are desired.
replacementCandidates.productOverview: AZ1117H-2.5TRE1 is Diodes Incorporated's SOT-223 fixed 2.5 V, 1.0 A low-dropout regulator from the AZ1117 family. This exact orderable code comes from the official AZ1117 SOT-223 ordering table. It matches the standard 1117 pinout (pin 1=GND, pin 2=VOUT, pin 3=VIN, tab=VOUT), but it should be treated as an older family reference and checked against the latest Diodes lifecycle / PCN status before approval for new designs.
replacementCandidates.reason: Functional enhanced alternative to the obsolete onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G. AZ1117H-2.5TRE1 is the exact Diodes SOT-223 orderable code for the 2.5 V AZ1117 family member, with ±1% tolerance and -40 C to +125 C operating range. It keeps the standard 1117 pinout and belongs in direct replacement reviews where tighter tolerance and industrial-temperature coverage are desired.

replacementCandidates.description: 1.0 A low-dropout fixed 2.5 V linear regulator, SOT-223 package, AMS1117 family reference.
fitNotes: Footprint- and pin-function-compatible P2P replacement for onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G. AMS1117-2.5 keeps the standard 1117 SOT-223 pinout and remains a valid family-level second-source option for 2.5 V, 1.0 A LDO continuity reviews.
replacementCandidates.productOverview: AMS1117-2.5 is the 2.5 V fixed-output SOT-223 member of Advanced Monolithic Systems' AMS1117 1 A LDO family. The manufacturer public materials available in this repair path confirm the AMS1117-2.5 family designation and SOT-223 package, but do not expose a more granular public reel suffix in the accessible source. This record is therefore kept at the manufacturer-public MPN level while its comparison attributes are repaired and normalized for live replacement review work.

replacementCandidates.description: 1.0 A low-dropout fixed 2.5 V linear regulator, SOT-223-3, exact AP1117 SOT-223 naming aligned to live catalog family pattern.
fitNotes: Footprint- and pin-function-compatible P2P replacement for onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G. AP1117E25G-13 is the SOT-223 fixed 2.5 V AP1117 family member aligned to the live exact-MPN naming pattern already used for sibling Diodes parts, and it belongs in direct 1117-family replacement comparisons.
replacementCandidates.productOverview: AP1117E25G-13 is the SOT-223 fixed 2.5 V member of the Diodes AP1117 1 A LDO family. The exact MPN is aligned to the existing live catalog naming pattern already used for sibling orderable parts such as AP1117E15G-13, AP1117E18G-13, AP1117E33G-13, and AP1117E50G-13. It uses the standard 1117 pinout and belongs in direct 2.5 V / SOT-223 replacement comparisons, but as a legacy family it should still be checked against current lifecycle status before new-design approval.
replacementCandidates.reason: Footprint- and pin-function-compatible P2P replacement for onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G. AP1117E25G-13 is the SOT-223 fixed 2.5 V AP1117 family member aligned to the live exact-MPN naming pattern already used for sibling Diodes parts, and it belongs in direct 1117-family replacement comparisons.

replacementCandidates.description: 1.0 A low-dropout positive fixed 2.5 V voltage regulator, SOT-223. Footprint and pin-function compatible with onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G.
fitNotes: Footprint- and pin-function-compatible P2P replacement for the onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G (2.5 V fixed, 1.0 A LDO, SOT-223). Same SOT-223 pinout (pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin). TLV1117LV drops 455 mV at 1.0 A versus 1.2 V for NCP1117, and quiescent current is 100 uA versus 5 mA. onsemi published 1Q2021 PDN for the NCP1117 family with Last Time Buy 2024-10-08 and Last Ship Date 2025-04-08. TLV1117LV is the recommended P2P migration target per TI cross-reference documentation.
replacementCandidates.productOverview: TLV1117LV25DCYR is TI's 1.0 A LDO fixed 2.5 V in SOT-223 (DCY package), part of TLV1117LV family. Maximum dropout 455 mV at 1.0 A, 6 V max input, ±1.5% output tolerance. Footprint- and pin-function-compatible with onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G (same SOT-223 pinout: pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin). Lower quiescent current than NCP1117 (100 uA vs 5 mA). Recommended as direct P2P drop-in for designs migrating from NCP1117 family after onsemi's 1Q2021 PDN (Last Ship 2025-04-08).
replacementCandidates.reason: Footprint- and pin-function-compatible P2P replacement for the onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G (2.5 V fixed, 1.0 A LDO, SOT-223). Same SOT-223 pinout (pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin). TLV1117LV drops 455 mV at 1.0 A versus 1.2 V for NCP1117, and quiescent current is 100 uA versus 5 mA. onsemi published 1Q2021 PDN for the NCP1117 family with Last Time Buy 2024-10-08 and Last Ship Date 2025-04-08. TLV1117LV is the recommended P2P migration target per TI cross-reference documentation.

target.productOverview: 1.0 A Low-Dropout Positive Fixed and Adjustable Voltage Regulators The NCP1117 series are low dropout positive voltage regulators that are capable of providing an output current that is in excess of 1.0 A with a maximum dropout voltage of 1.2 V at 800 mA over temperature. This series contains eight fixed output voltages of 1.5 V, 1.8 V, 2.0 V, 2.5 V, 2.85 V, 3.3 V, 5.0 V, and 12 V that have no minimum load requirement to maintain regulation. Also included is an adjustable output version that can be programmed from 1.25 V to 18.8 V with two external resistors. On chip trimming adjusts the reference/output voltage to within ±1.0% accuracy. Internal protection features consist of output current limiting, safe operating area compensation, and thermal shutdown. The NCP1117 series can operate with up to 20 V input. Devices are available in SOT−223 and DPAK packages. Features • Output Current in Excess of 1.0 A • 1.2 V Maximum Dropout Voltage at 800 mA Over Temperature • Fixed Output Voltages of 1.5 V, 1.8 V, 2.0 V, 2.5 V, 2.85 V, 3.3 V, 5.0 V, and 12 V • Adjustable Output Voltage Option • No Minimum Load Requirement for Fixed Voltage Output Devices • Reference/Output Voltage Trimmed to ±1.0% • Current Limit, Safe Operating and Thermal Shutdown Protection • Operation to 20 V Input • NCV Prefix for Automotive and Other Applications Requiring Site and Control Changes • Pb−Free Packages are AvailableApplications • Consumer and Industrial Equipment Point of Regulation • Active SCSI Termination for 2.85 V Version • Switching Power Supply Post Regulation • Hard Drive Controllers • Battery Chargers
